name: create_appointment
description: Book only after the caller explicitly confirms one live option. ALWAYS include caller_full_name. NEVER create an anonymous booking. Copy practitioner_id, branch_id, appointment_type_id, and start_time unchanged from ONE slot in the most recent search_availability result. Never reconstruct, round, or guess start_time. If the tool returns availability_search_required, do NOT retry: call search_availability again and reconfirm.
execution_message_description: Short confirmation-hold while writing the booking.

patient_id.description: Exact patient UUID from lookup_patient (patients[].id). NEVER pass a name or phone here.

caller_full_name.description: Exact full name spoken by the caller. Required even if patient_id is known.

practitioner_name.description: Doctor name if UUID is not in context.

branch_id.description: Branch UUID being booked. Must match the branch said out loud.

branch_name.description: Branch name if UUID is not in context.

appointment_type_name.description: Appointment type name if UUID is not in context.

start_time.description: Copy the complete ISO-8601 datetime WITH timezone offset unchanged from a single search_availability slot. Do not create this value from the spoken time.
